title: Ikigai
author: Héctor García & Francesc Miralles
description: The Japanese Secret to a Long and Happy Life

title: The Trial
author: Franz Kafka
description: The story of Josef K., a man arrested and prosecuted by a remote, inaccessible authority.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a Fuck
author: Mark Manson
description: A counterintuitive approach to living a good life.

title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
author: Yoru Sumino
description: An introverted high school boy finds a diary in a hospital waiting room that belongs to his classmate, Sakura Yamauchi, who is suffering from a terminal pancreatic disease.
